description: This API is used to set the flag to denote the bus subsystem to be used for voltage violation (voltage recovery and voltage dip) checks. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = set_volt_viol_subsys_flag(all) ierr, all = set_volt_viol_subsys_flag()

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Flag to set the subsystem definition for performing voltage violation check. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

all.description: Do voltage violation check on all buses.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API not met.
